raw_consumer_statement:
Summary of Issue Citi Bank mishandled a billing dispute concerning two XXXX XXXX XXXX registrations. 
XX/XX/year> : The first camp was cancelled by XXXX  ; my refund request went unanswered. 
XX/XX/year> : I opened a partial dispute for {$660.00}. 
XX/XX/year> : XXXX  removed my daughter from the second camp two days before it began ; I immediately updated the dispute to the full {$1400.00} and submitted written proof of refund approval.

Despite repeated updates and merchant confirmations that the full {$1400.00} refund was approved ( XX/XX/XXXX ) and executed by the third-party summer camp provider, Active ( XX/XX/year> ), Citi credited only {$660.00} when the case was closed on XX/XX/year>. The remaining {$740.00} has never been applied. 
I sent three follow-up emails on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX. To the best of my recollection, these emails were sent shortly after phone calls with Citi representatives to ensure my updated dispute information was received. None of these emails received acknowledgment or reply. After closure, I called XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year> and was told the case would be reopened, but no action followed.
